sellers_note: 2024 Jeep Wagoneer L Series II Carbide 4x4: Premium Space Meets Bold Design The 2024 Jeep Wagoneer L Series II Carbide 4x4 redefines the premium extended SUV category, offering an exceptional blend of sophisticated styling, massive cargo space, and legendary capability. Wrapped in a striking Baltic Gray Metallic Clearcoat exterior with a refined Global Black leather interior, this factory-certified SUV is designed for those who refuse to compromise on passenger comfort or utility. Families traveling from nearby Pitman will appreciate the extended 130-inch wheelbase, which translates to unmatched third-row legroom and expansive rear cargo volume. Whether you are planning a weekend getaway or coordinating daily school drop-offs, this premium sport utility vehicle delivers the presence, power, and versatility your active lifestyle demands. Advanced Twin-Turbo Performance and Capability Under the hood lies the state-of-the-art Hurricane 3L I-6 twin-turbo engine , delivering an impressive 420 horsepower while maintaining smooth, efficient power delivery through an 8-Speed Automatic Transmission . Engineered for maximum traction in all weather conditions, the advanced Four Wheel Drive system is supported by the Quadra-Lift Air Suspension and Semi Active Damping for an incredibly smooth ride. This model is exceptionally well-equipped for towing, featuring the HD Trailer Tow Package with a 3.92 Rear Axle Ratio , Trailer Brake Control , and a Two-Speed On Demand Transfer Case . Drivers can confidently customize their driving dynamics using the Selec-Terrain traction management system, making it easy to transition from highway cruising to challenging road conditions. Cutting-Edge Technology and Connectivity The cabin of the Wagoneer L is a hub of modern connectivity, anchored by the Uconnect 5 Nav with 10.1-inch Display and a fully digital 10.25-inch gauge cluster . Passengers can easily stay connected with wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, a built-in 4G LTE Wi-Fi Hotspot , and an impressive array of 11 USB ports distributed throughout all three rows. Navigating busy routes is effortless thanks to the integrated Navigation System and a helpful Head-Up Display that projects vital driving information directly onto the windshield. Audiophiles will appreciate the premium Alpine 10-speaker sound system that delivers crystal-clear audio quality, while the Surround View Camera System provides a comprehensive aerial view for effortless parking and maneuvering. Key Highlights Carbide Appearance Package - Features striking piano black exterior accents, black interior accents, and a dramatic 3-Panel Sunroof . Flexible Seating Group - Configured for 8-passenger seating with a 40/20/40 second-row bench featuring power tip and slide functionality. Convenience Group I - Includes advanced safety tech like Drowsy Driver Detection , Traffic Sign Recognition , and Intersection Collision Assist . Heated and Ventilated Front Seats - Enjoy personalized comfort in any season, complete with a Heated Steering Wheel . 22-Inch Gloss Black Wheels - Fitted with premium 285/45R22XL All-Season Tires for a commanding stance and confident grip. Hands-Free Liftgate - Offers convenient access to the massive rear cargo are At Spirit we offer a fast, full disclosure approach and are always focused on customers needs. As a quality CDJR dealership serving the Gloucester County, NJ area, we've satisfied customers since 1991. It's our pleasure to assist drivers in both South Jersey and Philadelphia with their vehicle needs
